item.title: Windsurf 2.0: Introducing the Agent Command Center and Devin in Windsurf
item.description: Ship more with local and cloud agents working together.

item.title: 2.0.44 — Windsurf 2.0
item.description: Read the full announcement here.

item.title: 2.0.1044 — Windsurf 2.0
item.description: Read the full announcement here.

item.title: 1.9600.41 — Adaptive Fix
item.description: We fixed a bug with the adaptive model router which prevented switching models after the first request.

item.title: 1.9600.1042 — Adaptive Fix
item.description: We fixed a bug with the adaptive model router which prevented switching models after the first request.

item.title: Introducing Adaptive: a smarter way to use Windsurf
item.description: We're launching multiple updates to Windsurf today: an Adaptive model router, a redesigned model picker with pricing context, and the removal of daily limits for Max.

item.title: 1.9600.40 — Adaptive Model Visibility
item.description: We've improved the visibility of the adaptive model in the model picker.

item.title: 1.9600.38 — Introducing Adaptive
item.description: We've made several model packaging changes, with more info here.

item.title: 1.9600.1040 — Adaptive Model Visibility
item.description: We've improved the visibility of the adaptive model in the model picker.

item.title: 1.9600.1038 — Introducing Adaptive
item.description: We've made several model packaging changes, with more info here.

item.title: 1.9600.1002 — Model & Cost Visibility
item.description: Replaced dollar signs with granular cost metrics for quota-based billing plans.

item.title: Introducing our new Windsurf pricing plans
item.description: We're simplifying Windsurf pricing across Free, Pro, and Teams alongside launching a new Max plan for our power users. The new plans replace the current credit-based system with industry-standard quotas.

item.title: GPT-5.4 Mini
item.description: GPT-5.4 Mini is now available in Windsurf, starting at 1x credits (promo).

item.title: GPT-5.4 Mini
item.description: GPT-5.4 Mini is now available in Windsurf, starting at 1x credits (promo).

item.title: GPT-5.4 is now available in Windsurf
item.description: GPT-5.4 is now available in Windsurf with multiple reasoning effort levels. For a limited time, self serve users enjoy promotional pricing starting at 1x credits.

item.title: GPT-5.4
item.description: GPT-5.4 is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users:

item.title: GPT-5.4
item.description: GPT-5.4 is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users:

item.title: 1.9566.1015 — Phoenix Alpha
item.description: Phoenix Alpha is now available in Next.

item.title: 1.9566.9 — New Model Picker
item.description: We introduced a new model picker that groups models by family and adds a hovercard with toggles for specific variants, like reasoning effort and speed. Separately, we also added the ability to pin models.

item.title: 1.9566.1009 — New Model Picker
item.description: We introduced a new model picker that groups models by family and adds a hovercard with toggles for specific variants, like reasoning effort and speed. Separately, we also added the ability to pin models.

item.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro is now available in Windsurf
item.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro is now available in Windsurf with Low and High thinking variants. For a limited time, enjoy promotional pricing on credit usage.

item.title: 1.9552.21 — Gemini 3.1 Pro
item.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users:

item.title: 1.9552.1021 — Gemini 3.1 Pro
item.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users:

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now available in Windsurf
item.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users: 2x credits without thinking and 3x credits with thinking.

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users:

item.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6
item.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users:

item.title: GLM-5 and Minimax M2.5 are now available in Windsurf
item.description: GLM-5 from Zhipu AI and Minimax M2.5 are now available in Windsurf with limited-time promotional pricing. Both models are included in Arena Mode's Frontier Arena and Hybrid Arena battle groups.

item.title: 1.9544.35 — New Models
item.description: Claude Opus 4.6 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf in research preview with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users until Feb 16:

item.title: 1.9544.1029 — Claude Opus 4.6 (fast mode)
item.description: Claude Opus 4.6 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf in research preview with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users until Feb 16:

item.title: 1.9544.1028 — New Models
item.description: Claude Opus 4.6 (fast mode) is now available in Windsurf in research preview with limited-time promotional pricing for self serve users until Feb 16:

item.title: 1.9544.24 — Wave 14: Arena Mode
item.description: Arena Mode brings side-by-side model comparison directly into your IDE, plus Plan Mode for smarter task planning.

item.title: 1.9544.1018 — Wave 14: Arena Mode
item.description: Arena Mode brings side-by-side model comparison directly into your IDE, plus Plan Mode for smarter task planning.

item.title: 1.13.8 — GPT-5.2-Codex
item.description: Adds support for GPT-5.2-Codex with four reasoning efforts (low, medium, high, and xhigh). GPT-5.2-Codex is OpenAI's latest model designed for agentic coding. It excels at working in large codebases over long sessions. For most tasks, we recommend using the medium reasoning effort.

item.title: 1.13.109 — GPT-5.2-Codex
item.description: Adds support for GPT-5.2-Codex with four reasoning efforts (low, medium, high, and xhigh). GPT-5.2-Codex is OpenAI's latest model designed for agentic coding. It excels at working in large codebases over long sessions. For most tasks, we recommend using the medium reasoning effort.

item.title: 1.13.5 — Gemini 3 Flash
item.description: Gemini 3 Flash is now available for all users. This model combines Gemini 3 Pro-grade reasoning with Flash-level speed and efficiency, making it ideal for agentic workflows and coding tasks.

item.title: 1.13.106 — Gemini 3 Flash
item.description: Gemini 3 Flash is now available for all users. This model combines Gemini 3 Pro-grade reasoning with Flash-level speed and efficiency, making it ideal for agentic workflows and coding tasks.

item.title: 1.13.3 — Wave 13: Merry Shipmas
item.description: Wave 13 brings first-class support for parallel, multi-agent sessions in Windsurf, along with Git worktrees, side-by-side Cascade panes, and a dedicated terminal profile for more reliable agent execution.

item.title: 1.13.104 — Wave 13: Merry Shipmas
item.description: Wave 13 brings first-class support for parallel, multi-agent sessions in Windsurf, along with Git worktrees, side-by-side Cascade panes, and a dedicated terminal profile for more reliable agent execution.

item.title: 1.12.164 — Features
item.description: Added a new "Promo" label to LLM models that are newly available or have special discount pricing

item.title: 1.12.47 — Features
item.description: Added a new "Promo" label to LLM models that are newly available or have special discount pricing

item.title: 1.12.43 — GPT-5.2
item.description: GPT-5.2 is now available in Windsurf. This model will be available for 0x credits in Windsurf (to paid users) for a limited time.

item.title: 1.12.161 — GPT-5.2
item.description: GPT-5.2 is now available in Windsurf. This model will be available for 0x credits in Windsurf (to paid users) for a limited time.

item.title: 1.12.41 — Features & Tools
item.description: Users can now configure Cascade Hooks on user prompts for logging all user prompts and blocking policy-violating prompts.

item.title: 1.12.39 — GPT-5.1-Codex Max
item.description: Introducing GPT-5.1-Codex Max in three reasoning tiers (Low, Medium, High). Low variant available at no cost to paid users for a limited time.

item.title: 1.12.157 — GPT-5.1-Codex Max
item.description: Introducing GPT-5.1-Codex Max in three reasoning tiers (Low, Medium, High). Low variant available at no cost to paid users for a limited time.

item.title: 1.12.36 — Claude Opus 4.5
item.description: You can now use Claude Opus 4.5 in Windsurf!

item.title: 1.12.153 — Claude Opus 4.5
item.description: You can now use Claude Opus 4.5 in Windsurf!

item.title: 1.12.35 — AI Models
item.description: Note: The Autocomplete setting has been removed as it was a legacy option that had no effect. Windsurf's Tab autocomplete feature is powered by Supercomplete.

item.title: 1.12.152 — AI Models
item.description: Note: The Autocomplete setting has been removed as it was a legacy option that had no effect. Windsurf's Tab autocomplete feature is powered by Supercomplete.

item.title: 1.12.150 — Worktree Preview
item.description: You can now use Windsurf's AI agent with worktrees to explore and modify code across multiple branches simultaneously.

item.title: 1.12.31 — GPT-5.1 and GPT-5.1-Codex
item.description: GPT-5.1 and GPT-5.1-Codex are now available in Windsurf. GPT-5.1 will become the default model in Windsurf for one week, and paid users get free access during this period.

item.title: 1.12.148 — GPT-5.1 and GPT-5.1-Codex
item.description: GPT-5.1 and GPT-5.1-Codex are now available in Windsurf. GPT-5.1 will become the default model in Windsurf for one week, and paid users get free access during this period.

item.title: 1.12.143 — Features
item.description: Enhanced the SWE-1.5 + Claude Sonnet 4.5 mode with improved performance and reliability for better coding assistance.

item.title: 1.12.28 — Features
item.description: Codemaps now include powerful new capabilities:

item.title: 1.12.142 — Features
item.description: Codemaps now include powerful new capabilities:

item.title: 1.12.140 — Features
item.description: New beta plan mode (type /plan in the Cascade chat input to activate it).

item.title: 1.12.27 — Falcon Alpha
item.description: You can now try a new stealth model in Windsurf: Falcon Alpha. Falcon Alpha is a powerful agentic model designed for speed. We're excited to hear what you build with it!

item.title: 1.12.138 — Falcon Alpha
item.description: You can now try a new stealth model in Windsurf: Falcon Alpha. Falcon Alpha is a powerful agentic model designed for speed. We're excited to hear what you build with it!

item.title: 1.12.20 — New Features
item.description: Learn more on our blog.

item.title: 1.12.8 — GPT-5-Codex is now in Windsurf!
item.description: GPT-5-Codex is now available for free (0x credits) for a limited time for paid users!

item.title: 1.12.114 — GPT-5-Codex is now in Windsurf!
item.description: GPT-5-Codex is now available for free (0x credits) for a limited time for paid users!

item.title: 1.12.3 — Deprecation Notice
item.description: The Windsurf Browser will be deprecated on Sept 11. We plan to refactor and release a replacement feature in the coming months. Please use Previews instead.

item.title: 1.12.2 — Grok Code Fast is now in Windsurf!
item.description: Grok Code Fast 1 is now available in Windsurf for Pro and Teams users! We're excited to enable it for free (0x credits) for a limited time.

item.title: 1.12.2 — GPT-5 Pricing Changes
item.description: Starting on Tuesday, August 26, our GPT-5 promotion will end for all users. The new pricing will be:

item.title: 1.12.1 — Devin features in Windsurf, stability improvements, and a brand new UI
1.11.5 — GPT-5 Available
item.description: Windsurf now supports the GPT-5 suite of models including GPT-5 (low reasoning), GPT-5 (medium reasoning), and GPT-5 (high reasoning). They are available for free for a limited time for paying users!

item.title: 1.11.1 — Kimi K2 Available
item.description: Windsurf now supports Kimi K2 model which costs 0.5 credits per prompt.

item.title: 1.8.105 — Patch Fixes
item.description: Based on the latest release of the Windsurf Editor, v1.8.2

item.title: 1.8.103 — Teams Features
item.description: Based on the latest release of the Windsurf Editor, v1.8.0

item.title: 1.8.102 — Improvements
item.description: Some improvements to app icons, fixes to SSH server connection, and UI Polish for Cascade Plugins.

item.title: 1.7.104 — Patch Fixes
item.description: Based on the latest release of the Windsurf Editor, v1.7.3

item.title: 1.7.2 — New App Icon & Upgraded Free Tier
1.7.103 — New App Icon & Upgraded Free Tier
item.description: Based on the latest release of the Windsurf Editor, v1.7.2

item.title: 1.6.121 — New o4-mini models available and Free (Limited Time)
1.6.119 — New GPT 4.1 Model available and Free (Limited Time)
1.4.3 — Windsurf Previews, Auto-Linter, and new MCP servers
1.3.9 — Claude 3.7
item.description: Cascade now has a new premium model available: Claude 3.7 Sonnet

item.title: 1.3.3 — Model Context Protocol, Custom App Icons, and Tab to Jump
1.2.4 — New Models: DeepSeek-R1, DeepSeek-V3 and o3-mini
1.2.1 — Cascade Memories, Web Search and Docs
